rooms.name: Village Square
rooms.description: A peaceful village square with a bubbling fountain. The villagers look worried, whispering of a monster in the forest.

rooms.name: Market District
rooms.description: A bustling bazaar filled with exotic goods and spices. Merchants cry out their wares from every corner.

rooms.name: Dark Forest
rooms.description: The trees are so thick here that barely any sunlight reaches the ground. Something growls in the shadows...

rooms.name: Wizard's Tower
rooms.description: The air crackles with magical energy. Bookshelves line every wall, and magical orbs cast a blue glow over the room.

rooms.name: Crystal Cave
rooms.description: Glittering crystals illuminate the damp cave walls with eerie, multicoloured light. The air is cold and still.

rooms.name: Ancient Dungeon
rooms.description: A damp underground passage lit by flickering torches. The smell of decay hangs heavy in the air.

rooms.name: Throne Room
rooms.description: A grand hall with a towering stone throne at the far end. Cobwebs hang from the rafters, and dust motes float in the pale light.

items.name: Healing Apple
items.description: A shiny red apple that glows faintly with restorative magic.

items.name: Forest Sword
items.description: An old broadsword found buried beneath the roots of an ancient oak.

items.name: Enchanted Wand
items.description: A slender wand carved from moonwood, humming with arcane power. It was the wizard's most prized possession.

items.name: Iron Shield
items.description: A battered iron shield that has seen many battles. Its surface is scarred but it still holds strong.

items.name: Health Potion
items.description: A glowing red magical liquid that smells of roses and copper. A single sip restores great vitality.

items.name: Ancient Crown
items.description: A golden crown encrusted with gems, cold to the touch. The Ghost King will want this back.

npcs.name: Frightened Villager
npcs.description: A local farmer who looks absolutely terrified, clutching a pitchfork for dear life.
npcs.dialogue: Please, brave adventurer! A goblin has been terrorizing our woods. Defeat it and I'll reward you handsomely!

npcs.name: Traveling Merchant
npcs.description: A shrewd trader with a heavy pack of goods and a glint of gold in his eye.
npcs.dialogue: Welcome, traveler! The finest wares from across the realm. Looking to buy or sell?

npcs.name: Vicious Goblin
npcs.description: A green-skinned monster holding a jagged dagger, drooling with malicious glee.

npcs.name: Old Wizard
npcs.description: An ancient sorcerer wearing a moth-eaten pointed hat, surrounded by floating books.
npcs.dialogue: Ah, a visitor! My enchanted wand was stolen by that wretched goblin. Bring it back and I shall grant you passage to the dungeon.

npcs.name: Skeleton Warrior
npcs.description: A rattling skeleton gripping a rusty sword, its empty eye sockets glowing faintly red.

npcs.name: Ghost King
npcs.description: A translucent figure sitting on the throne, radiating an aura of cold sorrow.
npcs.dialogue: Return my ancient crown to me, mortal... and I shall release the curse upon this land.

quests.name: Goblin Hunt
quests.description: The villager begs you to defeat the vicious goblin terrorizing the Dark Forest. A reward awaits!

quests.name: The Lost Crown
quests.description: The Ghost King haunts the throne room, longing for his Ancient Crown. Find it in the throne room and bring it to him.

quests.name: The Wizard's Lost Wand
quests.description: The Old Wizard's enchanted wand ended up in the Dark Forest. Retrieve it and return it to the Wizard.

player.name: Hurin
player.description: A brave young warrior with a sharp mind and sharper blade.
